title: Alpha Decay Chart — Per-Trade Forward Return Distribution Tracker
sequencer_note: feat-alpha-decay is analytics-only (read-only forward return tracker, no position sizing path). It is NOT blocked by the observation window. This note is here for clarity — the feature_sequencer.py ANALYTICS_ONLY_FEATURES set confirms this classification.
research_basis: Timothy Masters / markrbest.github.io: alpha decay charts measure return distribution over trade lifetime, sampled at regular intervals. Clean upward trajectory > dip-and-recover.
MicroAlphas (2025): swing-trade signal effectiveness diminishes after 3–10 days — forward return distribution reveals the optimal exit window.
goal: Measure the half-life of Decifer signals by computing the distribution of direction-adjusted returns at T+1, T+3, T+5, T+10 bars after entry. Reveals optimal exit horizon and which signal segments retain edge longest.
files_changed: dashboard.py — added '📉 Alpha Decay' tab, view HTML, JS (loadAlphaDecay, renderAlphaDecay)

implementation_notes.direction_normalisation: SHORT trades: forward return sign inverted so positive always = favourable
implementation_notes.data_source: yfinance Ticker.history() per symbol, stateless per call (thread-safe for single-threaded HTTP handler)
implementation_notes.missing_horizons: Trades too recent for T+10 contribute to T+1/T+3/T+5 only — no imputation
implementation_notes.aggregation: Pure-Python percentile (no numpy dependency), returns median/p25/p75 per horizon per group

dashboard_features: KPI strip: trades analysed, optimal hold period, T+1 and T+10 medians
Chart.js line chart with P25–P75 shaded band for 'all trades' and dashed lines per segment
Segment breakdown table: n, T+1, T+5, T+10 medians per group
Data quality note: ≥20 agent-scored trades needed for statistical significance
known_limitations: 65 trades currently available — 52 are manual backfills without signal_scores; only 13 agent-scored
Selection bias: backfilled trades may not reflect live agent scoring distribution
yfinance rate limits: /api/alpha_decay will be slow (~2–5s) on first call for 65 symbols
T+10 results sparse for trades entered after 2026-03-19 (horizon not yet reached)
next_steps: Once ≥20 agent-scored trades accumulated: run per-dimension IC correlation against forward returns
Add caching layer to /api/alpha_decay (recompute at most once per hour, cache in dash state)
Feed optimal_horizon back into exit-timing logic (Phase C BACK-005)
